notes.UR-11: RESOLVED — commons/payment-methods codes (TM, CK, TM/CK, etc.) are completely different from sendOrderInfo enum (CASH, CREDITCARD, etc.). These are TWO SEPARATE classification systems. Commons are for invoice display; sendOrderInfo enum is for POS dispatch.
notes.UR-19: PARTIALLY RESOLVED — sendOrderInfo accepted 'CASH' directly. Commons codes like 'TM' are not used in sendOrderInfo.
